titleStmt.title: SII 10.464: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 464. (A.R. No. 174 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1212. (Vikṛiti)

summary.p: States that Gaṇḍapeṇḍāra Ambadēva-Mahārāja instituted a worship of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva between the early morning worship and the midday worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bāhattaraniyōgādhipati
[Anē]kadēśādhīśa cātamarṇṇyasamuddharaṇa paścimarāyadāmō
darasainyadiśāpaṭṭa Ēkāṁtavīravīrāvatāra Ativiṣamahayārūḍha
prauḍharēkhārēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta kāyasthakulakamalamārtaṁḍa kadana
pracaṁḍa dōstaṁbhastaṁbhita sakalakṣitipālaśauryyayaśastōmatilaki
tadigaṁganāmukha vitaraṇaguṇavinirjitakāmadhēnukalpadruma tribhuva
nādhīśvara śrītripurāṁtakadēvadivyaśrīpādapatmārādha
ka parabalasādhaka maṁḍalika brahmārākṣasa nāmādi samastapraśastisahi
taṁ śrīmatu gaṁḍapeṁḍāra Aṁbadēvamahārājulu svasti śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1212 Agu nēṁṭi vikṛtisaṁvatsara bhādrapada bahuḷa 15 maṁnāṁṭi
sūryyagrahaṇapuṇyakālamuna śrītripurāṁttakaśrīmanmahādēvaraku prā
taḥsaṁdhya madhyāshasaṁdhyanaḍumanu tamapēriṁṭanu Oka Avanaramu kalpiṁ
ci (The rest Is Illegible )
Digital edition of SII 10.464 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
